case_title: SANDHU, GURMIT SINGH vs. COSSMAN, STEPHEN M et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-01-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-04-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MEMO RE DILILGENCE IN SERVING THE DEFENDANT, BY PLAINTIFF

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDHU, GURMIT SINGH AS TO DEFENDANT COSSMAN, STEPHEN M DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-01-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-05-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-12-1994
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-04-1994, CONTINUED TO NOV-03-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DISMISSAL NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDHU, GURMIT SINGH SERVED SEP-29-1994, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT COSSMAN, STEPHEN M
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
